sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n56777" key="kerato/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κερᾱτό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n56777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sounding with the horn</tr_>, of the <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μάγαδις</foreign> struck by the plectrum, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0377.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Telest.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
